title: SailPoint ISC Transform Schema - reference
description: Strict schema derived from SailPoint official Reference operation documentation. References (reuses) another transform by its id.

requiresPeriodicRefresh.description: Whether the transform should be reevaluated nightly as part of identity refresh. Default false.

id.description: ID of the transform to reference.

input.description: Optional explicit input. Some docs show input for reference; if present, it is an object. Modeled as a nested transform object to align with other operations.

NestedTransform.description: Nested transform object used as explicit input (name optional in docs).

attributes.description: Operation-specific attributes for the nested transform.
